origin.capability_match: cast their votes during the voting period

security_gap.gap_description: Votes could be intercepted and altered before being recorded, skewing the outcome of a governance decision.

actor_risk.description: External user with the ability to influence governance decisions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: Vote tampering can significantly impact the governance process, but the risk is mitigated by integrity requirements.

assumptions: The voting process is vulnerable to man-in-the-middle attacks.
There is no end-to-end encryption or signature verification for votes.

mitigation.strategy: Implement end-to-end encryption and signature verification to ensure the integrity of votes.

description: A malicious actor could intercept and tamper with votes, changing the outcome of governance proposals.

trace_source.matched_capability: cast their votes during the voting period
